overview.description: The Neuberger Emerging Markets Debt Hard Currency ETF (NEMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund broadly invests in fixed income tied to emerging countries denominated in developed market currencies. The actively managed fund may hold debt securities of any credit type, quality, or maturity. NEMD was launched on Aug 11, 2025 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.
